title: hebe × dartonii
intro: Hebe × dartonii, also known as Dart's hebe, is a hybrid plant species within the hebe genus, native to the mountains of New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hebe × dartonii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Hebe × dartonii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and uses.
